channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: Former Qatar PM: Netanyahu using Iran war to reshape Middle East
item.description: Sheikh Hamad bin Jassim warns Strait of Hormuz crisis is most dangerous fallout of war on Iran, calls for 'Gulf NATO'.

item.title: Taiwan civilians sharpen self-defence skills ahead of Trump-Xi summit
item.description: Taiwanese civilians are flocking to self‑defence courses, amid fears China could one day use force to seize the island.

item.title: Picking up the torch from Shireen Abu Akleh
item.description: Shireen's killing was meant to scare Palestinians into silence. Instead, it has inspired many to speak up.

item.title: Iran says US making ‘unreasonable’ demands in negotiations to end war
item.description: Foreign ministry spokesman Esmaeil Baghaei says Iran's proposal to end the conflict, unblock Hormuz Strait is generous.

item.title: Two more cruise ship passengers test positive for hantavirus
item.description: One French passenger and one from the US test positive after being evacuated from the vessel in the Canary Islands.

item.title: Narendra Modi urges Indians to conserve fuel amid war on Iran
item.description: Narendra Modi urges Indians to conserve fuel amid war on Iran

item.title: Thailand’s former PM Thaksin Shinawatra released from jail
item.description: Supporters of Thailand’s former prime minister Thaksin Shinawatra greeted him as he was released early from prison.

item.title: The Global Sumud Flotilla is sailing on, here is why
item.description: The Israeli attack on part of our flotilla has convinced us we must continue with our mission.

item.title: Mexicans demand justice for missing people on Mother’s Day
item.description: Mexicans demand justice for missing people on Mother’s Day

item.title: Iran war day 73: Trump and Tehran clash over latest peace proposals
item.description: Brent crude rises amid a continuing deadlock as Trump describes Iran's response as 'totally unacceptable'.

item.title: Is the Vatican standing up to Trump?
item.description: Redi Tlhabi speaks with Kim Daniels on the growing strain between the Vatican and Donald Trump.

item.title: Ex-Israeli PM: Hezbollah is the enemy of Lebanon and must be disarmed
item.description: Former Israeli PM Ehud Olmert speaks to Redi Tlhabi on Lebanon, the 2006 war, Hezbollah, and the US-Israeli war on Iran.

item.title: Spain’s Nico Williams sustains hamstring injury before World Cup
item.description: Midfielder looks distraught while limping off the field before half-time in Athletic Bilbao's 1-0 loss to Valencia.

item.title: Gaza filmmakers slam BBC after shelved documentary wins Bafta
item.description: 'We refuse to be silenced and censored,' journalist and presenter Ramita Navai says while accepting the award.

item.title: Fans celebrate as Barcelona clinches LaLiga title
item.description: Barcelona fans filled the streets in wild celebration after a convincing 2-0 El Clasico win over Real Madrid.

item.title: UK’s Keir Starmer battles for political survival after election defeat
item.description: The UK prime minister promised to face up to big challenges while battling Reform and Greens in his speech on Monday.

item.title: Philippine Congress impeaches VP Sara Duterte for second time
item.description: Trial of vice president in question after Duterte's allies stage a coup and wrest control of the Philippine Senate.

item.title: Timberwolves win, tie playoff series after Spurs’ Wembanyama ejected
item.description: Edwards's 36 points give Minnesota 114-109 win and tie the Western Conference semifinals 2-2 against San Antonio Spurs.

item.title: Things are not going so well for Russia
item.description: Stalled advance in Ukraine and economic woes are not the only worries for the Kremlin - also a distant ‘near abroad'.

item.title: Trump calls Iran response “totally unacceptable”
item.description: Report on the latest developments after US President Donald Trump rejected Iran’s response to the US peace proposal.

item.title: Kenya hosts France’s Macron: Why the relationship matters to both
item.description: Nairobi's partnership with Paris has sparked criticism, with many worried Kenya's interests will be subordinated.

item.title: Russia and Ukraine accuse the other of ceasefire violations
item.description: Russia and Ukraine accuse the other of ceasefire violations.

item.title: Thailand’s Thaksin Shinawatra released from prison
item.description: Influential former prime minister released on parole after spending about eight months behind bars.

item.title: Gaza documentary dropped by the BBC wins BAFTA
item.description: A documentary exposing Israel's attacks on Gaza's health system and personnel won Best Current Affairs at the BAFTAs.

item.title: What next for Real Madrid after Barcelona’s La Liga and Clasico triumph?
item.description: Barca sealed their La Liga title defence in the best way possible on Sunday, but where do Real go now, after their loss?
